amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Annex III — paragraph 1 — point 6 — point c
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Annex III — paragraph 1 — point 6 — point c

## Text proposed by the Commission

(c) AI systems intended to be used by law enforcement authorities to detect deep fakes as referred to in article 52(3);

(c)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

deleted

AI systems intended to be used by law enforcement authorities to detect deep fakes as referred to in article 52(3);
